name: Barack Obama
subject: There's so much to be proud of
body:
Take a few minutes to look back on everything we've done together Friend --

I hope you'll spend a few minutes this holiday season taking stock of just how much we've accomplished this year and the past few years of my administration.

There's a lot to be proud of.

Together, we've helped millions of Americans get access to affordable health care. We saw our economy continue to rebound and grow, and create good jobs to build a strong middle class. We took historic action to combat climate change, and made progress to reform a long-broken immigration system.

That is undeniable, genuine progress.

These things were only possible because I knew that there were so many people like you in my corner, and because of all the Democrats you've helped elect around the country -- from senators and governors to mayors and city councilmembers.

So as you're reflecting on these past few years -- and on the challenges ahead in the years to come to protect all that we've done -- take a few minutes to think about what you'd like to see happen.

Then, make an investment in the future of our party.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064316/2518566865/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064317/2518566865/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064314/2518566865/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064315/2518566865/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064312/2518566865/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064313/2518566865/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2")**

** Thanks for everything you've done -- this year and every year.

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064310/2518566865/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e064311/2518566865/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e06431e/2518566865/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c23d/4067b0a/22f77cfea/7e06431f/2518566865/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161215_bo_v2s2&source=em_20161215_bo_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: FlaDems.com
subject: you have 2 options:

body:
we can send one of two messages | Listen -- Trump is in Florida TODAY, and we can send one of two messages.

**Option 1:** That Florida Democrats are ready to fight back and stand up for our values
**Option 2:** That we'll stand by while Trump and his cabinet roll back all the progress we've made

name: Barack Obama
subject: I'm asking for your commitment
body:
I hope you'll stand with us. Friend --

Over the past eight years, we've created change by working hard, working smart, and working together to make things better for our communities and our nation.

But protecting what we've done together will take even more hard work in the months and years ahead in the next administration.

I know we can do it, because I've seen what we've already achieved together. But we need to keep strengthening the foundation of our movement -- the Democratic Party -- today, so we can be ready for the fights to come. That's how we'll defend what we've already accomplished, and that's how we'll keep our country from being taken backwards.

Today, I'm asking for your commitment to this work. Chip in $3 or more to keep building our movement right now.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c233/4067b0a/22ee52f62/7e0633da/3629817530/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161216_bo2_nd&source=em_20161216_bo2_nd")**

Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c233/4067b0a/22ee52f62/7e0633e2/3629817530/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161216_bo2_nd&source=em_20161216_bo2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c233/4067b0a/22ee52f62/7e0633e3/3629817530/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161216_bo2_nd&source=em_20161216_bo2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
clean_body: I hope you'll stand with us. Friend -- Over the past eight years, we've created change by working hard, working smart, and working together to make things better for our communities and our nation. But protecting what we've done together will take even more hard work in the months and years ahead in the next administration. I know we can do it, because I've seen what we've already achieved together. But we need to keep strengthening the foundation of our movement -- the Democratic Party -- today, so we can be ready for the fights to come. That's how we'll defend what we've already accomplished, and that's how we'll keep our country from being taken backwards. Today, I'm asking for your commitment to this work. Chip in $3 or more to keep building our movement right now. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" Or donate another amount: "" Thank you, Barack | ---|--- Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: For when the news gets overwhelming >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bdd/2665343464/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all")
---

Peter,

Every time I check my inbox or get on Facebook my heart rate spikes.

Every new story about another unqualified nominee from Trump, Russia's interference with our election, and congressional Republicans' plans for 2017 makes me angry and frustrated.

There have been a few times when I've just wanted to close my laptop and walk away. But I know there's a better reaction when the news gets overwhelming: 1. Get organized and 2. Encourage people to give to EMILY's List to elect more pro-choice Democratic women.

**Donate $3 now to help elect more women who will fight against the Trump agenda and the Republicans who support it. And then post this link so your friends can donate too:**

**[http://emilyslist.org/Fight](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bde/2665343464/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_NewsGetsYouDown?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpemilyslistorgFight&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all")**

It may feel now like things are bad and only going to get worse, but that thinking won't protect our friends and neighbors who are most vulnerable to a Trump administration. And it won't recruit candidates or help them win.

So it's time to channel that anger, fear, and despair and gather all the resources we can to support as many women as we can in the years to come.

Ready to fight?

**Donate $3 to help elect more women in the coming cycle, and then share this link so your friends can do the same:**

**[http://emilyslist.org/Fight](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bdf/2665343464/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_NewsGetsYouDown?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpemilyslistorgFight&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bd8/2665343464/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_NewsGetsYouDown?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bd9/2665343464/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bda/2665343464/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7728/24c69fd9/4d35d0/18ef5bdb/2665343464/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all&source=WPEFEX17N_digital_email_20161216_News_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: Make your voice heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here.
We must keep the pressure on them. We must hold them accountable. Sign the petition now.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bc7/2fde7c66/43a88864/15692212/4143121040/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Yesterday, over 15,000 people signed our petition standing against the unprecedented actions that Republican legislators are taking. Their actions -- stripping away Roy's power and making drastic changes to how our government works -- are a slap in the face to all of those who worked so hard to elect Roy as our next governor. It's time Republican legislators start respecting our voice. **[We must keep the pressure on them. We must hold them accountable. Sign the petition now.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bc7/2fde7c66/43a88864/15692212/4143121040/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** The people of North Carolina rejected the partisan bickering and political games of the last four years. The Republicans lost an election and now are throwing a temper tantrum -- but their actions will have negative consequences for years to come. **[Make your voice heard -- add your name today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bc7/2fde7c66/43a88864/15692212/4143121040/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for your continued support, Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bc7/2fde7c66/43a88864/15692212/4143121040/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161216enoughadvgqnonsigrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Official DSCC Update
subject: (not asking for money)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
How will the DSCC fight for Democrats in 2017 and beyond? Here's our plan for what's next: [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9b2/3040149960/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161216-OfficialUpdate-ProsHV")
---
Friend,

We've been hearing from a lot of Democrats lately -- issue advocates, community activists, and hardworking individuals across the country -- who are asking what's ahead for the DSCC in 2017 and beyond. **Here 's our plan:**

**First, we will stand up and fight.** We're going to take on Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell when it comes to healthcare, a woman's right to choose, civil rights, Social Security, and every issue that defines our party -- and we will never relent in defending President Obama's progress.

**We will keep immense pressure on Republicans** \-- amplifying your voices with petitions and helping our Democratic Senators hold their GOP colleagues accountable. This starts with thoroughly evaluating Trump's Cabinet nominees, demanding independent investigations on his ties to Russian hacking, and refusing to back down until his conflicts of interest are addressed.

**Second, we will immediately begin our 2018 Senate campaign.** The only way to put our policy agenda back in the driver's seat -- and pass laws like equal pay and paid family leave -- is by chipping away at the Republican majority.

**That 's not going to be easy, and here's why: 25 Democrats are up for reelection.** That's 17 more seats than the GOP has to defend, and 15 more than we had to protect this year. It includes leaders like Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Tim Kaine, Chris Murphy -- and many others who Republicans would love to send packing.

It also includes 10 states that Democrats lost in November's presidential election. This sets the stage for an uphill midterm election for Democrats across the map. In fact, the _Washington Post_ recently said Democrats need "a LOT of breaks over the next 23 months" to avoid losing ground.

But Democrats have overcome obstacles and defied the cynics before (electing Barack Obama twice!). We know with your help, victory is possible. **That 's why we must begin our efforts right now **to counter right-wing special interests who will attack Democrats with all they've got.

**So if you 're ready for the road ahead, here are a few ways to get started: **
-> First, make sure to follow us on **[Facebook](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9ad/3040149960/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/DSCC/") **and [**Twitter.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9ac/3040149960/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/dscc") Staying involved with current events and keeping tabs on Senate Republicans will be crucial.

-> Second, share your feedback on the 2018 landscape with us by [**taking our official survey.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9af/3040149960/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/member-survey?source=PT-20161216-OfficialUpdate-ProsHV")

-> Finally, pledge to join Democrats in the fights ahead by [**adding your name to our petition.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9b2/3040149960/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161216-OfficialUpdate-ProsHV") Thank you for being part of this team. These past two months have been tough, but with grassroots Democrats like you on our side, we will come back stronger than ever.

Thanks,
Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend:

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161216-OfficialUpdate-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9a9/3040149960/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9a8/3040149960/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee9d/2b07114c/40cd8684/7368d9ab/3040149960/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
